title: Sanjana Rao, Jacob Alexander, Abhinay V launch disputes firm Polaris Legal
description: Sanjana Rao, Jacob Alexander and Abhinay V have announced the launch of Polaris Legal, a civil and commercial litigation focused firm based in Bengaluru.Sanjana Rao, Jacob Alexander, Abhinay VPolaris Legal specialises primarily in civil and commercial litigation, while also offering a broad spectrum of expertise in practice areas such as general corporate advisory, real estate transactions, employment and labour law, insolvency and restructuring, intellectual property, amongst others.
